---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why do you need it?

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Give an example (CLI command, JSON format, etc.).

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this?

## Additional Context

Any extra information: new kind/relation types, links to docs, etc.
